name: visibility_graph_rsi
notes: VGRSI on XAU Sharpe 2.55-3.6. Geometric, not trend/momentum.

name: local_hurst_mr_timing
notes: H<0.5 anticipates faster MR in crypto pairs.

name: tcn_mr_speed_estimator
notes: Distribution-free MR speed estimator. Universal, no re-fitting.

name: latent_lob_stress_detector
notes: 3-regime LOB model, +18.6 timestep lead. BTC/USDT validated.

name: wavelet_hurst_dynamic_vol
notes: Daubechies-4 wavelet Hurst, R2>0.72 OOS.

name: multi_asset_ofi_granger
notes: Cross-asset OFI with Granger peer selection. R2 90%+ improvement.

name: cross_sectional_illiquidity
notes: Low-correlation with momentum. Hard-Mask attention filter.

name: precious_metal_sentiment_adaptive
notes: Adaptive metals+sentiment (Financial Innovation 2026).

name: connors_rsi2_crypto
notes: RSI(2)<10 BUY, 72% WR on BTC. Crypto-only (fails on commodities).

name: variance_ratio_regime_gate
notes: VR(k)<1 = MR, >1 = trending. Lower VR = higher MR Sharpe.

name: gold_silver_ratio_ml_mr
notes: GSR z-score + ML regime filter. Sharpe 0.3->0.73.

name: adx_dual_regime_switch
notes: ADX<=25 MR mode, >25 breakout. Meta-signal architecture.

name: hmm_rf_regime_classifiers
notes: Per-regime RF classifiers. BTC Sharpe 1.76 vs 1.16.

name: rvol_exhaustion_reversal
notes: RVOL>4x at extremes = exhaustion reversal. Volume climax.

name: eth_btc_rotation_zscore
notes: ETH/BTC ratio z-score >2 = rotation. ETF outflow confirmation.

name: bpgdm_contrarian_metals
notes: Gold miners bullish % <10% = contrarian BUY. 2-3 year cycle.

name: absorption_ratio_regime
notes: Cross-asset Absorption Ratio: fraction of total variance explained by top-N/5 PCA eigenvectors from

name: geometric_berry_phase_regime
notes: Berry Phase Rate from spectral embedding. Quantum-geometry regime detector. Cohen d=0.72 OOS.

name: differential_entropy_regime
notes: Rolling differential entropy with heavy-tailed Pareto kernel for regime detection.

name: mstr_mnav_premium_mr
notes: MSTR mNAV ratio mean reversion. BUY at discount, SELL at excessive premium.

name: stablecoin_supply_ratio_btc
notes: SSR: BTC mcap / stablecoin mcap. Low SSR = buying power (BUY).

name: gold_silver_ratio_zscore
notes: G/S ratio Z-score mean reversion. Ratio ~57:1, historically compresses in bull markets. XAG-specific.

name: cot_positioning_extreme
notes: COT speculative positioning at 13yr lows for silver. Contrarian indicator for metals.

name: solar_demand_proxy
notes: Silver industrial demand proxy from solar panel installation data. Structural, slow-moving.

name: etf_flow_momentum
notes: ETF inflow/outflow momentum for BTC/ETH. Highest-impact new BTC signal candidate.

name: stablecoin_exchange_supply
notes: Stablecoin supply on exchanges as BTC buying power proxy. On-chain derivative.

name: bb_squeeze_breakout
notes: BB squeeze (BB width < threshold) + breakout direction. Specifically for range-bound breakout detection.

name: multi_onchain_convergence
notes: Convergence of 5 on-chain metrics (MVRV, SOPR, NUPL, exchange flow, funding). Currently only 1/5 active for BTC.

name: cusum_signal_health_gate
notes: IMPLEMENTED: CUSUM-based online accuracy degradation detector. Module exists, needs outcome_tracker integration.

name: sentiment_extremity_gate
notes: IMPLEMENTED: Regime gate blocking extreme sentiment (BUY accuracy root cause). Merged f822bfa4.

name: order_flow_entropy_range_gate
description: Order flow entropy as range-bound detector. Low entropy = no informed trading = ranging market. Gate MR signals on low entropy. Uses trade-level data.
formula: H = -sum(p_i * log(p_i)) over binned trade imbalances in rolling window. Low H → range, high H → directional. BUY when H < threshold AND price at range low.
citation: Hidden Order in Trades Predicts Size of Price Moves, arxiv:2512.15720

name: sentiment_extremity_gate
description: F&G intensity (not direction) as regime gate. Extreme sentiment (both fear AND greed) causes wider spreads + adverse selection. BUYs work better in moderate sentiment (30-70 F&G). Counter-intuitive: extreme fear is WORSE for BUY execution.
formula: intensity = |FG - 50|. Moderate zone: intensity < 20. In moderate: BUY at range low, SELL at range top. In extreme: force HOLD.
citation: The Extremity Premium: Sentiment Regimes and Adverse Selection in Cryptocurrency Markets, Farzulla 2026, arxiv:2602.07018

name: gs_kalman_zscore_regime
description: Kalman-filter gold/silver spread with z-score entry/exit. ML regime gate suppresses trades during unstable spread conditions. Sharpe 0.3→0.73 with regime filter.
formula: Kalman state-space model: hedge_ratio = state[0]. spread = gold - hedge_ratio * silver. z = (spread - rolling_mean) / rolling_std. BUY silver when z < -2 AND regime=stable. SELL when z > 2 AND regime=stable.
citation: Gold Silver Pair Trading - Mean Reversion Strategy Using Machine Learning, SSRN 5710242

name: btc_asymmetry_bias_correction
description: BTC structural asymmetry: 75% bear days vs 25% bull days (UMAP analysis). BUY signals start with 75% base failure rate. Confidence adjustment corrects this.
formula: rolling_bear_fraction = count(close < open) / window. If bear_fraction > 0.6: scale BUY confidence by (1 - bear_fraction). Vote HOLD when correction makes confidence < 0.3.
citation: MARKET REGIME ANALYSIS ACROSS ASSET CLASSES: UMAP Clustering Study, Rivin 2025, SSRN 5857822

name: funding_4h_divergence_mr
description: Funding rate diverging from 4H price direction = range-bound conditions. When funding positive but price declining (or vice versa), market in controlled equilibrium. MR signals valid.
formula: funding_dir = sign(avg_funding_24h). price_dir = sign(close_4h - close_4h_prev). divergent = funding_dir != price_dir for 3+ consecutive periods. If divergent AND price at range low: BUY. If divergent AND price at range top: SELL.
citation: Who Sets the Range? Funding Mechanics and 4H Context in Crypto Markets, arxiv:2601.06084

name: nfci_cip_risk_gate
description: Three-variable risk regime: NFCI + USD broad index + Treasury 10y-2y slope. All stress = risk-off (suppress BUY). All normal = risk-on (allow BUY). Daily frequency from FRED.
formula: stress_score = norm(NFCI) + norm(USD_broad) + norm(-yield_slope). If stress > 1.5 sigma: HOLD. Else: pass through.
citation: Three-Variable Benchmark for Post-GFC CIP Deviations, Shin 2026, arxiv:2605.20137

name: ofi_ou_reversion_speed
description: Model OFI as Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process. Reversion speed parameter measures how range-bound market is. Fast reversion = tight range = MR signals reliable. Extreme negative OFI + fast reversion = BUY.
formula: Fit OU to rolling OFI: dOFI = theta*(mu - OFI)*dt + sigma*dW. theta = reversion speed. zscore = (OFI - mu)/sigma. BUY when zscore < -2 AND theta > threshold.
citation: Stochastic Price Dynamics in Response to OFI, Hu & Zhang 2025, arxiv:2505.17388

name: choppiness_index_regime_gate
notes: CI>61.8 = choppy (suppress directional), CI<38.2 = trending. Simple regime gate.

name: trend_vol_regime_matrix
notes: 4-state matrix (trend x volatility). Different signal weights per quadrant.

name: metals_seasonal_pattern
notes: Gold Sep-Feb strong, Silver Mar-Jun strong. Month-of-year confidence modifier.

name: ultimate_oscillator_mr
notes: Multi-timeframe momentum (7/14/28 periods). Less noisy than single RSI.

name: connors_rsi_composite
notes: RSI(3) + streak RSI + percentile rank. Short-term MR. Already have ConnorsRSI2 partial.

name: fisher_transform_signal
notes: Gaussian normalization of price. Clearer turning points than RSI. Low novelty vs existing.

name: real_yield_level_velocity
description: Enhanced real yield signal: TIPS level z-score + rate-of-change velocity, not just binary direction. Level captures structural positioning, velocity captures momentum.

name: cot_adx_trend_gate
description: COT positioning extremes gated by ADX trend strength. COT contrarian signals whipsaw during strong trends. ADX>25 suppresses contrarian COT.

name: slv_etf_flow_zscore
description: SLV ETF daily flow z-score. 5-day rolling sum vs 90-day history. Strong inflows = physical acquisition = supply squeeze. Strong outflows = institutional selling.

name: eth_exchange_netflow_zscore
description: ETH-specific exchange netflow z-score. Sustained outflows = accumulation. ETH exchange balances at 10-year low. Currently only BTC has on-chain netflow.

name: eth_btc_ratio_roc_zscore
description: ETH/BTC ratio rate-of-change z-score. Rising ratio = risk appetite broadening, altcoin season. Breakout precedes altcoin bull markets. Very low implementation cost.

name: defi_tvl_price_divergence
description: DeFi TVL growth rate vs ETH price divergence. TVL growing faster than price = organic demand not priced in. Uses DefiLlama free API.

name: funding_rate_extreme_contrarian
description: Contrarian funding rate signal. Persistently high positive funding = crowded longs = reversal risk. Persistently negative = shorts squeeze. 7-day rolling avg at extremes.

name: eth_upgrade_calendar
description: ETH fork/upgrade calendar effect. Buy-the-rumor 30d before, sell-the-news 7d after. Pectra May 2025, Glamsterdam mid-2026. Template: econ_calendar.py.

name: monthly_seasonality_confidence
description: Monthly seasonality confidence modifier. XAG: Jan/Jul strongest (69.5%/63.6%), Jun/Sep weakest. Gold: Sep-Feb strong. Recent: Oct strong 2020-2024.

name: regime_adaptive_weight_vectors
description: Replace flat regime penalties (0.75x/0.80x) with per-regime weight lookup tables. Logistic classifier on [realized_vol_20d, ADX_14, Hurst_exponent] selects regime-specific signal weights. Papers show dramatic improvement vs flat multipliers.

name: walk_forward_parameterized_windows
description: Walk-forward window length as hyperparameter. Fast signals need 2-week windows; slow signals need 3-month. Prevents Chronos-style small-sample crashes. Feb 2026 paper demonstrates Robust Sharpe optimization.

name: llm_noise_robust_gating
description: IMPLEMENTED: Suppress LLM BUY/SELL when self-reported confidence < 55%. Hybrid LLM-Transformer research validates noise-robust gating. Applied to Qwen3 and Ministral.

name: btc_etf_flow_signal
description: BTC ETF flow signal: daily net inflows/outflows as directional indicator. ETF flows now absorb 9x daily mining supply. Zero ETF flow coverage is biggest signal gap for BTC.

name: bull_bear_structured_prompt
description: Restructure Layer 2 prompt to require bull_case/bear_case/risk_assessment JSON sections before verdict. Cheapest multi-agent debate approximation. Validated by BlackRock+Columbia Apr 2026 research.

title: Consensus systematically overconfident: 90-100%% conf = 32.8%% actual accuracy
description: Calibration analysis shows inverted relationship at high confidence. 50-60%% conf bucket well-calibrated (49.2%% actual). 70-80%% = 54.3%%. 90-100%% = 32.8%%. Unanimous consensus may be contrarian signal. Immediate action: add unanimity penalty (partially implemented as unanimity overcorrection fix), investigate confidence scaling.

name: bocpd_regime_switch
description: Bayesian Online Changepoint Detection on return series. Detects regime breaks in real-time via posterior run-length. On changepoint: switch from trend-following to mean-reversion. Addresses metals coin-flip accuracy by catching sharp reversals.
formula: BOCPD recursive Bayesian update with exponential hazard h(r)=1/lambda. Run-length posterior tracks bars since last changepoint. Changepoint when max-posterior run-length drops below threshold. On break: MR mode (BUY at -2z, SELL at +2z). Otherwise: trend (momentum).
citation: Wood, Roberts, Zohren (2021), Online CPD for Momentum Trading, JFDS

name: kalman_trend_momentum
description: Kalman filter on raw price: smooth trend state + velocity. 3-regime classification. Gold Sharpe 2.88.
formula: State [price, velocity]. Kalman recursion. BUY in TREND_UP, SELL in TREND_DOWN, HOLD in RANGE.
citation: Singha et al (2025). Sharpe 2.88 gold futures.

name: gvz_ivp_regime_gate
description: GVZ Implied Volatility Percentile regime overlay. IVP>80pct=MR favored, IVP<20pct=trend favored.
formula: ivp = count(gvz_past_252d < gvz_today) / 252. Gate directional confidence.
citation: CBOE GVZ. IV mean-reversion widely validated.

name: gold_implied_lease_rate
description: Implied lease rate from spot-futures spread. High rate=physical scarcity=bullish.
formula: implied_forward = (futures/spot-1)*(365/dte). lease_rate = sofr - implied_forward. Z-score.

name: eth_validator_queue_ratio
description: ETH validator entry/exit queue ratio. Entry>>exit=bullish.
formula: queue_ratio = entry_queue/max(exit_queue,1). Z-score. BUY ratio>10, SELL ratio<2.

name: gold_futures_trend_regime
description: Smoothed trend-momentum regime. Walk-forward. Sharpe 2.88.
formula: Kalman trend + momentum ROC. Fractional Kelly with impact. ATR exits.

name: cross_commodity_leadlag
description: Cross-commodity lead-lag via Granger causality network. Sharpe 1.5.
formula: Granger F-stat at lags 1-24h. Directed graph. Network momentum.

name: mstr_mnav_mean_reversion
description: MSTR mNAV premium MR. BUY below 1.0x, SELL above 2.0x.
formula: mnav = mstr_mcap / (btc_holdings * btc_price). Z-score.

name: eth_blob_fee_activity
description: Post-EIP-4844 blob utilization and fee as ETH demand proxy.
formula: blob_util = blobs_used/target. Fee z-score. BUY util>0.7.

name: vix_gsr_confluence
description: VIX 12m z-score + GSR 3m z-score confluence. 26 trades.
formula: Both z-scores > 0.9 required. Monthly holding.

name: btc_gold_correlation_regime
description: 30-day rolling Pearson correlation between BTC and Gold daily returns as regime signal. Below -0.48 historically preceded sharp BTC rallies within 2-4 weeks. Current -0.88 is near record extreme. Mean-reverts reliably.
formula: corr_30d = pearson(btc_returns[-30:], gold_returns[-30:]). z = (corr_30d - mean_252d) / std_252d. BUY BTC when z < -2.0. SELL when z > 1.5.

name: oi_funding_quadrant
description: 4-quadrant: OI direction x FR sign. Extreme Q1 (OI>5%/day, FR>3%/day) = contrarian SHORT within 1-5 days. Q4 (OI down>15%, FR negative 2+ days) = contrarian LONG. 2523 days analyzed.
formula: oi_pct = delta_oi/oi. quadrant = classify(oi_pct>0, fr>0). Extreme: oi_pct>0.05 AND fr>0.03 = SHORT.
citation: Axel Adler Jr, 2523-day BTC OI+FR analysis

name: comex_silver_stress
description: COMEX Stress Index: coverage ratio (registered/OI, 40%), inventory trend (25%), paper leverage (20%), vault outflows (15%). Coverage <15% = Stress. Current 16.1% and tightening.
formula: coverage = registered / OI. stress = weighted_composite. BUY when stress > 60.

name: kalshi_macro_bridge
description: Kalshi prediction market daily probability changes forecast crypto vol. KXFED predicts BTC vol (t=3.63). KXRECSSNBER stable OOS. KXCPI predicts altcoin vol. Orthogonal to existing signals.
formula: delta_prob = prob_today - prob_yesterday. vol_signal when abs(delta) > threshold.

name: eth_usdt_netflow_directional
description: ETH net inflows to exchanges negatively predict ETH returns at 1-6h. USDT inflows positively predict BTC+ETH. Academic validation 2017-2023.
formula: netflow_z = (netflow_6h - mean_30d) / std_30d. BUY when z < -1.5. SELL when z > 1.5.

name: liquidation_cascade_detector
description: 4-module scoring (0-100): Volume (20pts), Keltner Exhaustion (30pts), Price Action (25pts), Higher TF Alignment (25pts). Fire at score>=45. Contrarian reversal.
formula: total = vol_score + keltner_score + pa_score + tf_score. Signal when total >= 45.

name: epu_gold_vol_predictor
description: EPU index as gold vol predictor via GARCH-MIDAS. Free from policyuncertainty.com. High EPU = higher gold vol. Scales MR confidence up, trend confidence down.
formula: epu_z = (epu - sma_12m) / std_12m. vol_regime = high if z>1.

name: silver_lease_rate_spike
description: Silver lease rate as physical tightness early-warning. Spikes preceded 40-140% rallies. Lead price by days-weeks. Current 6.3%.
formula: lease_z = (rate - sma_90d) / std_90d. BUY when z > 2.0.
